name: Baticim Bati Anadolu Cimento Sanayii Anonim Sirketi
summary: Bati√É¬ßim Bati Anadolu √É¬áimento Sanayii Anonim Sirketi operates in the cement industry in Turkey. It offers Portland cement clinkers and potassium silicate cements; Portland, sulphate resistant Portland, Portland compound, and pozzolanic cements; and aggregate and cement bypass dust products. The company was founded in 1966 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey.
